DisplayName: AnkSVN is developed by Ank God.
Bare Tail is developed by Bare Metal Software.
Calypsoviewer is developed by Calypso Technology.
CppCheck is developed by a community of contributors and does not have a specific vendor company.
DMaaST is developed trough several vendors
Easy File Locker is developed by Easy File Locker Team.
FABric is developed by the company Fabric Software.
Git is not associated with a specific software vendor as it is an open-source project. However, it was created by Linus Torvalds.
GrepWIN is developed by Andreas Scherbaum.
ImHex is an open-source project, so it does not have a traditional software vendor company.
Kleopatra is developed by The KDE Community.
Lessor PM is developed by Lessor.
Lessor Portal is developed by QuikFlip.
LogExpert is developed by a company called "LogExpert".
Mastedatabasen is developed by the Danish Agency for Data Supply and Efficiency (SDFE).
MinEnergi2 is developed by the company Metrum.
Notepad++ is developed by Don Ho.
PADS Viewer is developed by **PADS Software**.
Rufus is developed by Pete Batard.
SQLite Browser is developed by the community and is not associated with a specific company vendor.
Spyder is developed by the Spyder Project.
The Code::Blocks application is developed by Code::Blocks Team.
The Dr. Memory application is developed by the company named "University of Hawaii".
The Software Vendor for the application TLF Service is TLF Technology.
The application Flatpak is developed by the GNOME Project.
TortoiseGit is developed by the TortoiseGit Team.
XCA is developed by XCA (X Certificate and Key Management).
labgrid is developed by the company **Labgrid**.
